query: SELECT awayTeam, homeTeam, gameStatus, awayGoalie, homeGoalie, modelAwayPuckLine, modelHomePuckLine, modelAwayPLOdds, modelHomePLOdds, modelOverOdds, modelUnderOdds, modelRunAt FROM games WHERE gameDate = '2026-03-15' AND sport = 'NHL' ORDER BY sortOrder;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3AW8r3RRauadYzS.root --database MW3FicTy7ae3qrm8dx8Lua --execute SELECT awayTeam, homeTeam, gameStatus, awayGoalie, homeGoalie, modelAwayPuckLine, modelHomePuckLine, modelAwayPLOdds, modelHomePLOdds, modelOverOdds, modelUnderOdds, modelRunAt FROM games WHERE gameDate = '2026-03-15' AND sport = 'NHL' ORDER BY sortOrder;
